content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.12%, Auto leading +2.33%, IT +1.48%, and VIX cooling -5.93% to 16.98. Book is well-positioned with all 8 holdings showing positive aggregate P&L (+10K unrealized). Deployment at 50% leaves room but the priority today is locking in gains on existing positions via trailing SLs rather than chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.66,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.5%, near 52w high zone. Current SL at 1028.66 is already above entry (locks in ~4.5% gain). No-op MODIFY would be wasted — keeping HOLD instead. Actually retracting MODIFY; see position_actions HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1438.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — see position_actions; emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.2%, broke out on strong Q4 (PAT +11%, Rs 5.25 final dividend). Current SL at entry (469); tightening to 472 (+0.6% above entry) locks in gains while giving room above today's intraday low (464). Raising target slightly to 495 to reflect breakout structure (CMP near 52w high 476). Tighter SL keeps risk budget intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 605.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — see position_actions; HOLD instead. Tomorrow Apr 30 is dividend record date (Rs 11). Stock will trade ex-div May 1 with ~Rs 11 drop expected; current SL at 605 already accounts for this. Will reassess post ex-div."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.5%, SL 1028.66 already locks in ~4.5% gain (above entry 984). Strong Q4 (PAT Rs 2,291 cr, GNPA <1%), trading near 52w high 1141. Holding for target 1110. SL is well-placed — no further tightening needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.9% but holding above SL 119. Defensive hedge in book, gold structurally supported by central bank buying and geopolitical tape. SL is 3% below CMP — appropriate for ETF volatility. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1% only, SL at 401 (0.9% below entry, ~1.7% below CMP). Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending. SL well-placed at recent swing low. Trail not warranted yet — under +2% threshold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, SL 1742 already above entry 1734 (locked in small gain). Organon acquisition added leverage concern but stock held up. Current SL appropriately placed; no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4%, near 52w high. SL 318 is 1.2% below CMP — tight enough. Defensive play, transmission monopoly, peak power demand record. Hold for target 335."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up 2.2% after Q4 beat (PAT +11%, dividend Rs 5.25). Current SL at entry 469 — tightening to 472 (above entry, locks in 0.6%). Raising target to 495 given breakout near 52w high 476 and brokerage PT 530. Risk budget remains comfortable."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, dividend record date Apr 30 (Rs 11). Stock will ex-div drop ~Rs 11 on May 1 (~1.8% drop). Current SL 605 is 1.4% below CMP and absorbs ex-div move only marginally. Holding through ex-div for dividend capture; will reassess SL post Apr 30 close. Q4 was a record print so fundamentals are strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 250,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 196.50,
      "stop_loss": 188.00,
      "target": 215.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68% YoY with GNPA improving to 3.3%, breakout above prior 52w high (192.48). Position size ~4.9% of capital (Rs 49K). SL 188 = 4.3% risk, target 215 = +9.4%, R:R ~2.2. Risk budget 4.9% × 4.3% = 0.21% — well within 0.5% cap. Modest size given moderate confidence and microfinance-sector overhangs (CRISIL negative outlook, RBI penalty)."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY @ 2400 from prior session — stock now at 2441 well above limit. Setup has run; rather than chase, cancel and reassess. Glenmark up ~66% YoY at premium P/E 53-63x — chasing extended breakout into pharma sector that's not in Q4 top picks is poor R:R. Frees up planning capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN order from 52+ hours ago. Pharma index only +0.5% today, lagging broader rally. Cancel to clean up order book; can re-enter with fresh thesis if pharma breaks out."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stale OPEN order from 53+ hours ago. Already have NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA in book — adding TATAPOWER would build a 4-name power/energy cluster exceeding cluster discipline guideline. Cancel to avoid correlation pile-up."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1028.66 already locks in 4.5% gain. Position well-managed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL 119 is 3% below CMP — appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1438 already at entry+1.8%, locks gain. Price approaching target 1485."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Under +2% threshold for trail. SL 401 already tight."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1742 above entry — already in profit-protected mode."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 318 is 1.2% below CMP — tight enough given regulated utility low-vol profile."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat + breakout. Trail SL from 469 (entry) to 472 to lock small gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Holding through Apr 30 ex-div for Rs 11 capture. Will reassess SL post ex-div May 1."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "MARUTI / BAJFINANCE / RELIANCE worth tracking but post-results extension is too far for entry. INDUSINDBK has unresolved SEBI/NFRA derivatives saga — avoid despite Q4 recovery. ONGC up 6% near 52w high but at MACD bearish crossover and crude is binary on Fed/geopolitics — pass. GRSE +12.5% gap-up too extended.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book well-balanced: Energy cluster (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA) at ~15% of capital — at the cluster watchlimit; not adding more energy/power. Cancelling TATAPOWER pending order to enforce cluster discipline. Cancelling stale GLENMARK and PHARMABEES orders to clean book. One new entry (BANDHANBNK) sized conservatively at ~5% given 0.62 confidence. Performance context (14% win rate, 0.4x profit factor over 5d) demands smaller sizing and tighter discipline — exactly what this tick reflects. Daily P&L +1% so far; priority is to defend it via SL trails and avoid over-deployment."
}
